table_rating_scale.description: The employee's performance in this area is significantly below the expected standards and is unacceptable. Immediate action is required
The employee's performance in this area is below the expected standards and requires improvement.
The employee is performing adequately in this area, however there may be areas for improvement or refinement.
The employee consistently meets the established performance standards and expectations for this area.
The employee consistently demonstrates exceptional performance, surpassing the set standards and expectations. They go above and beyond what is required.
